Document:
[head=1][color=#FFEF00]Introduction[/head][/color]
[color=#FFFACD]Triad is an 18+ roleplay server, with a focus on providing a place for players to roleplay in a mature environment. This has the allowance of sexual activities to happen, but this does not mean the priority of the server is erotic content.[/color]
We recommend keeping the game at an arms length. Healthy distance between yourself and roleplay is essential for maintaining IC and OOC separation. Do not interfere with your physical or mental health by overcommitting to a game too heavily.
It's easy to get immersed in what's happening or invested in your characters' story and their successes. This is not an MMO to grind, this is a place to make and tell stories. Loss and setbacks are part of those stories. Try to tell your character's story of overcoming them instead of reacting negatively to a game.
[bold]Please make sure to also read [textlink="the lore primer" link="BasicLore"] to better understand your character's circumstances and context to the round.[/bold]
[color=#a4885c][head=2]Clarifications[/head][/color]
[color=#a4885c]1.[/color] Rules are intended to be enforced as written; should a conflict with interpretation of rules as written occur; regardless of outcome of prompting action: the ambiguous rule will be re-written to be futureproofed. These rules are intended as a promise made to our players regarding other players and staff conduct. Which can be used to reasonably set expectations.
[color=#a4885c]2.[/color] Rules bind staff and players alike; while there is some discretion for staff breaches when pursued in the interest of the current round, server, or community at large; any such instance will be investigated.
[color=#a4885c]3.[/color] Ahelp is intended for immediate term communication and interventions; issues requiring broader discussion or appeals for any ahelp action are to be relegated to tickets.
[color=#a4885c]4.[/color] All tickets can be adjudicated either privately in a ticket or publicly via the discord. Ticket transcripts will be sent to you upon their conclusion.
[color=#a4885c]5.[/color] LTAP (leaving to avoid punishment) by disconnecting, ignoring admin messages or otherwise will result in an appeal-only ban.
[color=#a4885c]6.[/color] Administration, like yourselves, are roleplayers, and want to help you in telling stories. You can always aHelp to ask for assistance with character modifications, trinkets or other things that facilitate roleplay scenarios. We're happy to work with you to tell your character's story.
[color=#FFFACD]If you have any questions about these rules, please use the Admin help menu by hitting F1 in-game, or clicking the "AHelp" button in the lobby, or alternatively, ask for assistance on the discord.[/color]
[color=#ffff00][head=3]Severity guidelines:[/head][/color]
• ★ / Minor infraction
•[color=#f1c232]★★[/color] / Major infraction
•[color=#cc0000]★★★[/color] / Extreme infraction
# Core Rules These rules apply at all times, including between rounds.
Each section contains its own list of rules. Click on the section name to view the full version.
- [textlink="Section 1. Use of Language and Respect Section" link="TriadRuleC1"] - [textlink="Section 2. Gameplay Section" link="TriadRuleC2"] - [textlink="Section 3. Metagaming Section" link="TriadRuleC3"] - [textlink="Section 4. New-life Section" link="TriadRuleC4"] - [textlink="Section 5. Naming Section" link="TriadRuleC5"] - [textlink="Section 6. Roleplay Section" link="TriadRuleC6"] - [textlink="Section 7. Point Of Interest and Safe Zone Section" link="TriadRuleC7"] - [textlink="Section 8. Erotic/Extreme Roleplay Section" link="TriadRuleC8"] - [textlink="Section 9. Command, Security, and TDF Guidelines" link="TriadRuleC9"] - [textlink="Section 10. Escalation Guidelines" link="TriadRuleC10"] - [textlink="Section 11. Ship Saving and Design Section" link="TriadRuleC11"]
